description: Guard/integration: a read-only user cannot trigger draft creation or any write side effect by opening the bundle draft editor.
Guard/integration: bundle rule update fails when the targeted rule does not belong to the bundle's current draft revision for the tenant.
Guard/integration: bundle rule delete fails when the targeted rule does not belong to the bundle's current draft revision for the tenant.
Migration/contract: schema constraints enforce revision-to-bundle consistency strongly enough that a rule cannot reference the wrong bundle/revision combination.
Runtime: a `selected_clients` bundle rule denies records outside its configured client set and allows matching records when the rule is otherwise satisfied.
Runtime: a `selected_boards` bundle rule denies records outside its configured board set and allows matching records when the rule is otherwise satisfied.
Action/integration: starter bundle seeding creates bundles with enforceable published revisions rather than inert draft-only revisions.
Regression: premium Time bundle rules apply to the migrated time/delegation evaluation path using the same resource key as the bundle editor/catalog.
Simulator: billing simulation loads the same kind of record as the migrated billing authorization path and produces a decision over the expected record identity.

Simulator: for supported resource families, draft-vs-published simulation includes the same builtin resource-specific narrowing semantics that the runtime path applies, or explicitly rejects unsupported simulation modes.
Unit: API authorization subject shaping preserves client and portfolio identifiers across both snake_case and camelCase user payloads.
API parity/pagination: migrated ticket list pagination metadata remains coherent under authorization narrowing and does not strand authorized records behind filtered pages.
API parity/pagination: migrated project list pagination metadata remains coherent under authorization narrowing and does not strand authorized records behind filtered pages.
API parity/pagination: migrated quote list pagination metadata remains coherent under authorization narrowing and does not strand authorized records behind filtered pages.
